since_last: 57% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.52%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.38% · Gold +0.74% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 57% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.52%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.52%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.03%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +18.16%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +18.16%, QCOM +9.96%, LRCX +7.39%, AMAT +7.22%, LSCC +6.68%. Laggards: BABA -2.42%, DELL -2.20%, PLTR -2.00%, CRM -1.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.45% at $158.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
